title: STP Heavy Duty Car Brake Cleaner 500 ml, Cleans Brakes without Disassembly, Reduces Brake Noises, Mechanical Car Cleaning Products, Concentrated Cleaning Formula, Made in the UK
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: What You'll Get - 500 ml Brake Cleaner, Heavy Duty Brake Parts Cleaner
Removes dirt and grime with ease
description: From the manufacturer Why should I use STP Professional Series? STP is a trusted brand worldwide that has been established for over 60 years The range is scientifically formulated to help improve car performance STP Professional Series is suitable for all vehicles, diesel and petrol, no matter how old they are STP Professional Series STP’s Professional Series range is a line of best-in-class engine care and maintenance products specially designed to meet the needs of a professional user. What is the difference between STP and STP Professional Series? STP Professional Series comprises of rigorously independently tested professional strength products, tailored at core motoring problems Has extra detergency, features & benefits, and is designed be used in conjunction with service intervals. Engine Flush Application For petrol & diesel engines Allow the car’s engine to run until it reaches normal operating temperature Turn engine off, then pour entire bottle into oil crankcase (treats 3-6L). Start engine and run at fast idle for 15 minutes Turn engine off and carefully drain oil whilst still hot Replace oil filter and add appropriate oil that meets vehicle specification For extra protection add a bottle of STP Oil Treatment Engine Flush Features & Benefits Helps neutralise harmful engine acids ­Removes harmful sludge and deposits Restores engine performance and efficiency Stops/prevents minor oil leaks Compatible with single, multigrade mineral or synthetic oils Should be used every oil change to maintain cleanliness and performance of all vital engine parts Heavy Duty Brake Parts Cleaner Application Remove wheel or brake drum as needed Protect rubber parts from spray Spray brake parts until dust and contaminants run off freely Air dry or wipe with clean, soft cloth Heavy Duty Brake Parts Cleaner Features & Benefits Removes dirt and grime Reduces brake noise Prevents uneven braking Cleans without disassembly Can be used on drum brakes (linings and shoes, drums, cylinders and springs), and heavy duty disc brakes (caliper units, brake pads and rotors) Can also be used to degrease metal assemblies quickly and safely Carb Spray Cleaner Application For Carburettor and Carburettor Linkage With engine cool or only slightly warm, begin clean up. Remove air cleaner and apply Carb Spray Cleaner to the entire exterior surface of the carburettor Allow to soak for a minute and then re-apply to thoroughly remove dirt, grease and deposits. Start the engine and apply Carb Spray around the inside of the carburettor throat to remove deposits Important: Wash off immediately if sprayed on car finish. Can cause wax and paint streaking. Carb Spray Cleaner Features & Benefits Cleans carburettors, linkages and automatic chokes Keeps carburettors in peak condition Must not be sprayed on the car’s finish: can cause wax and paint streaking Application For Automatic Chokes With engine cool or only slightly warm, begin clean up To thoroughly clean automatic chokes, spray both ends of the choke valve while opening and closing it by hand T hen spray the vacuum cylinder to remove dirt and gum.S tart the engine and apply Carb Spray around the inside of the carburettor throat to remove depositsI IMPORTANT: Wash off immediately if sprayed on car finish. Can cause wax and paint streaking. Heavy Duty Engine Degreaser Application Warm the engine for 5 minutes, and turn off. Cover the distributor to keep it dry Spray generously on a warm (not hot), dry engine. Allow STP Professional Engine Degreaser to penetrate and loosen grease and grime for 10-15 minutes. Hose off with water. Use the minimum amount of water necessary to remove deposits. Uncover distributor and idle engine until dry. Heavy Duty Engine Degreaser Features & Benefits Penetrates and dissolves heavy dirt and deposits Is quick and easy to use Can be used on car, truck, van and tractor engines Must not be sprayed or dripped on external body paint, asphalt driveways or other surfaces affected by petroleum solvents – if contact occurs flush immediately with water
